privileged_info_summary: The task involves refactoring a Java test class in Eclipse. The RadiationPhysics project directory is located at /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/RadiationPhysics with the test file at src/test/java/com/medtech/physics/DoseCalculatorTest.java. The file contains 5 legacy test methods (testDoseAt100MU, testDoseAt200MU, testDoseAt50MU, testDoseLargeField, testDoseSmallField) that test dose calculations with different monitor units and field output factors. Key test data values include output factors of 1.045 (large field) and 0.892 (small field), with corresponding expected dose values of 156.75 cGy and 267.6 cGy respectively. The tests use JUnit 5 with assertEquals assertions and a delta tolerance of 0.001.
